Spring

Spring has accepted responsibility for supervising the festivities, inspecting the canapés and ensuring that no crumb goes unnoticed.

Useful details

Before you join us

What to wear

Friday: Winter elegance. Gentlemen are kindly requested to wear a jacket. Ladies, no hats please. Bring your best winter dress.

Saturday: Relaxed.

Where to stay

  • Hotel des Galeries
  • Hotel Hubert Grand Place
  • Motel One Brussels

All are central and close to the Galeries Royales Saint-Hubert.

Gifts

Your presence is the greatest gift. For those wishing to mark the occasion, our list will be hosted on Kadolog.

Open Kadolog
